title: Why St. Augustine Businesses Choose Local Video Partners
excerpt: There's a version of this conversation that happens a lot. A marketing director gets a recommendation for a production company out of Orlando or Jacksonville. Here's what gets lost in that calculation.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Bridge of Lions St. Augustine - local video production backdrop

content.alt: St. Augustine Amphitheatre sign - local venue knowledge
content.caption: Local knowledge means understanding your venues, your community, and your audience

seo.title: Local Video Production St. Augustine | Why Choose Local
seo.description: Why St. Augustine businesses choose local video production partners over Orlando or Jacksonville agencies. The real advantages of working with a local team.

schema.headline: Why St. Augustine Businesses Choose Local Video Partners
schema.description: Why local businesses choose local video production partners over regional agencies.
